summary: CRITICAL: Deliverable is incomplete and non-functional. SecretRotation.Tests.ps1 (referenced in workflow line 22) and .actrc (referenced in Run-ActTests.ps1 line 95) are missing—workflow will fail immediately. Core modules (SecretRotation.psm1, Invoke-SecretRotation.ps1, secret-rotation-validator.yml) are well-designed with proper error handling, types, strict mode; no actionlint validation shown despite task requirement. Run-ActTests.ps1 has significant code duplication: temp repo setup (lines ~120–145) and assertion logic (~155–175) repeat for each case—should factor into helpers. Cannot ship; requires test file, config, refactoring, and actionlint verification.
